THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUNA, MARIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2770-A BRYANT STREET WITH GARAGE, STORAGE & COMMON AREAS, STAYED UNTIL APR-30-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY OF EVICTION THRU 5PM ON 4/30/97. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT FOR FEB, MARCH & APRIL 1997. DEFT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT, IF ANY AND INCLUDING ANY INTEREST, RETURNED TO DEFT ACCORDING TO LAW. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS.
